# BudgetBuddy AI

> Smart Personal Finance Management with AI-powered insights — track transactions, manage budgets, and achieve your savings goals.

BudgetBuddy AI is a personal finance web and mobile app for individuals who want a calm, low-stress way to manage money. It combines a Money Hub for transactions, a Smart Budget system, Savings Goals, and an AI Financial Advisor chat. Available on the web, iOS, and Android.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page describing BudgetBuddy AI and its core features.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How user data is collected, stored, and protected.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Legal terms governing use of the BudgetBuddy AI service.
